description: Write a known PCM Synth tone to the device via DT1 SysEx (e.g. set specific values for Common, MFX, PMT, and a couple of partials). User then exports to SVD via USB. The SVD entry becomes the test fixture for i7-2y8.12. CLI command: write preset values → user exports → extract fixture.
title: Create PCM Synth test tone via MIDI for SVD validation
